title: Add emergency services phone numbers (911) to Town Services section

requirements.text: Update the Town Services page (frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx) to display dedicated emergency services listings for the Sheriff, Fire Department, and Ambulance, each showing their service name and a phone number that links to 'tel:911'. Ensure the 911 emergency banner and these individual service entries are visually prominent and consistent with the existing Northern Maine theme.

quotes: Emergency services like the sheriff fire department and ambulance phone numbers to 9 1 1.

acceptanceCriteria: The Town Services page lists three emergency service entries: Sheriff, Fire Department, and Ambulance.
Each emergency service entry displays a clickable phone link using 'tel:911' that dials 911 on mobile devices.
The emergency services section is visually distinct (e.g., highlighted or grouped under an 'Emergency Services' heading) and easy to locate on the page.
The existing 911 emergency banner on the Services page is preserved or enhanced, not removed.
Styling remains consistent with the deep forest green, slate gray, and warm wood-toned theme.

constraints: Do not modify backend data models or add backend logic — all emergency contact information is static and frontend-only.
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding any other new services or sections beyond emergency services.
Storing emergency contact numbers in the backend.
Changing the overall layout or navigation structure of the site.
